rules: When editing any file in this workspace, check if a Co-Steer sidecar file named `<filename>.review.md` exists. If it does, read and address the feedback comments: address those with status="accepted"; analyze and address those with status="pending" (asking for clarification if unsure). Do NOT process comments inside <!-- COSTEER_RESOLVED_START ... COSTEER_RESOLVED_END --> or comments with status="rejected" or status="resolved". Once addressed, change their status to "resolved" in the sidecar.
